mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_application (user_id, product_id, amount, term_months, annual_rate, purpose, status, apply_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{amount}, #{termMonths}, #{annualRate}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{applyTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan_application WHERE DATE(apply_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM loan_application WHERE status = 1
